summary_one_line_zh: 大模型竞争转向：推理、置信度与安全执行同时变重要
summary_one_line_en: LLM competition is shifting toward reasoning, confidence, and safe execution.

items.title_zh: 微软押注推理/代码双旗舰
items.title_en: Microsoft bets on reasoning and code models
items.why_zh: MAI-Thinking/Code 直指主战场：推理与编程，不再只靠通用聊天模型。
items.why_en: MAI targets the two highest-value workloads: reasoning and coding, signaling tougher platform competition.
items.so_what_zh: 评估你们的评测集：单独拆出推理、代码、工具调用三条线。
items.so_what_en: Split evals into reasoning, coding, and tool-use tracks.

items.title_zh: 大模型的自信表达不等于可靠
items.why_zh: 它把“会不会说不准”拆成可测问题，直接影响产品级拒答、风险提示和路由。
items.why_en: It turns confidence into a measurable product signal, affecting refusal, risk UX, and routing.
items.so_what_zh: 把置信度输出接入日志，和最终正确率做分桶对照。
items.so_what_en: Log confidence and bucket it against outcome accuracy.

items.title_zh: Agent 终于开始安全跑代码了
items.title_en: Agents finally get safer code execution
items.why_zh: 安全执行沙箱是 agent 落地门槛；MicroPython/WASM 这类方案会影响你们的工具链设计。
items.why_en: Safe execution sandboxes are a deployment gate for agents; WASM/MicroPython changes toolchain choices.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的代码执行器改成可替换后端：本地解释器、WASM、隔离容器三选一。
items.so_what_en: Make your code runner backend-swappable: local, WASM, or isolated container.
